title: Subagent Helper: implement empathy workflow (continuation v2)

context: This is a continuation sprint. Previous sprint 2026-04-02T01-36-53-756Z-subagent-helper-empathy ran out of runtime.

- PR2 introduces NEW runtime_direct boundary - NO legacy path exists for comparison
- shadow parity验收标准与PR2目标不匹配
- This spec version REMOVES shadow parity, replaces with new path self-evidence
- Empathy is treated as runtime_direct only (no registry_backed semantics)
- subagent_ended is fallback/observation only, NOT primary completion contract
Focus on implement-pass-2 and verify stages.
- Provide WORKFLOW_TRACE evidence showing new path closure
Code existing in files is NOT sufficient. Producer MUST:
2. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compiles
3. Run npm test to verify tests pass
Use PD-only changes; do not modify /home/csuzngjh/code/openclaw.
PR2 scope: empathy observer + deep-reflect ONLY. Diagnostician/Nocturnal NOT migrated.
Treat empathy as plugin-owned runtime_direct only.
subagent_ended may be used only as fallback, observation, or UNPROVEN signal.
All OpenClaw compatibility assumptions must be verified by reviewer_b.

implement-pass-1: Implement startWorkflow(), notifyWaitResult(), finalizeOnce() with idempotency.
Add workflow store integration (subagent_workflows table plus workflow events).
Provide WORKFLOW_TRACE evidence: show state transitions and event persistence.
DO NOT claim DONE without actual file creation and git commit.
implement-pass-2: Provide NEW_PATH_SELF_EVIDENCE: runtime_direct path is closed and observable.
Confirm fallback behavior is explicit and documented.
Do not expand scope beyond EmpathyObserverManager and its RuntimeDirectDriver.
verify: Verify empathy persistence via workflow store queries.
Confirm merge gate: local SHA == remote/feat/subagent-helper-empathy SHA.
global_reviewer must confirm: OpenClaw assumptions verified? Business flow closed? Architecture improved? Degrade boundaries explicit?
Confirm no regression in other subagent modules.
